g.text: For each line: remove comments (;, parentheses)
Track positions, feedRate, spindleSpeed, tool state
For each raw move: set startX/Y/Z from current position
Handle incremental mode: newX = x + move.x
calculateArcLength() for arc moves (R or I/J format)
Update display: total distance, cut/rapid, bbox, time
Color code: red=rapid(dashed), cyan/amber/green=cut by depth
